deploy.startCommand: cd backend && /opt/venv/bin/python -u -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from wsgi import app; print('App created OK', flush=True)" 1>&2 && exec /opt/venv/bin/python -m gunicorn wsgi:app --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 1 --preload --timeout 120 --access-logfile - --error-logfile -
